name: Mark Takano
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $392,030 for Mark Takano in U.S. House, CA-39. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
